ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT( $User.Id = '0054J000002PIdC' || $User.Id = '0054J000002Q8am' || $User.Id = '0054J000002QSkU' || $User.Id = '0054J000004QaYN' || $User.Id = '0054J000004RQEhQAO' || $User.Id = '0054J000000vlO1QAI') && ( ISNEW() || ISCHANGED(ID_Type__c ) || ISCHANGED(Insurer_factor__c) ) && ISPICKVAL( ID_Type__c , "1" ) && ((ISNEW() && DisableValidation__c = false) || (NOT(ISNEW()) && NOT(ISCHANGED(DisableValidation__c)))) && ISPICKVAL(Insurer_factor__c, "") && RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PersonAccount' && CreatedById <> '2F0014J00000Jp1GHQAZ' && NOT( AccountStatus__c = 'לקוח רזה')
